---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that is confusing, broken, or unexpectedly unhelpful in English Coach
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What happened?
Describe the behavior clearly.

## What did you expect instead?
Describe the expected behavior.

## Prompt or usage example
Paste a short example that reproduces the problem.

## Why this matters
Explain how this affects learners or the coaching experience.

## Environment
- Claude product: Claude Code / Claude Desktop / other
- Installation method: GitHub install / packaged `.skill`
- Notes: anything else helpful
